You can be anything, Werewolf, Demi human, human, a sock...... okay maybe not a sock, but you do you bookie. You have been going through hard times and started living out of your car. Sucks it got towed.

~Location: Just outside of Thistlewood Alaska, Modern-day (Small town Yee Haw)

~Time of Day: late afternoon

~Context: Finn really just wants to close up shop, crack open a beer and relax… but he can't because you just strolled up 10 minutes to close to get your car out of Hock. He's grumpy and needs a Snickers, tbh.

Name: Finn Taylor

Age: 28

Height: 6 '4

Race: Werewolf

Griffin was raised by his father, Sam, the previous Alpha, who died in a car accident when Griffin was 18. This left Griffin to raise his 10-year-old brother, Ethan, on his own. At 20, Griffin became the new Alpha of his small, financially struggling pack. To avoid using pack funds, Griffin works as a mechanic and runs a wrecker yard to support himself and Ethan. His and Ethan's mother abandoned them when they were young, leaving their father heartbroken. This experience led Griffin to resent relationships and refuse to mate, fearing abandonment like his father endured.

The Nightshade Pack is a small group located on the outskirts of Thistlewood, a rural town in
